questionHtml: Explain how the catalyst increases the rate of the reaction.
markschemeHtml:
«catalyst provides an» alternative pathway ✔

«with» lower Ea
OR
higher proportion of/more particles with «kinetic» E ≥ Ea(cat) «than Ea» ✔

meta.title: Explain how the catalyst increases the rate of the reaction.
